char_overview: UTokyo graduate at 18, 万事屋 part-timer. Rejected formal 狩灵 career for freedom to game, snack, and apply genius on her own terms.
char_looks: 166cm Short apricot-colored hair Brown eyes. White shirt, khaki jacket, brown checkered skirt, brown leather shoes. None, uses 灵力回路 for combat.
char_flaws: Overconfident; easily bored; gives up when tasks become tedious.; Rates enemies before battle, mentally calculating the exact percentage of energy required.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-水镜: Naturally awakened 灵力回路 replicating any 灵力 weapon from memory, Higher cost for stronger weapons. Cannot replicate technological weapons.
char_mission: Part-time at 万事屋 to fund gaming and snacks, indefinitely.
char_origin: Natural-born 灵能者, graduated UTokyo at 18, 灵力回路 水镜 awakened naturally. Chose 万事屋 over formal 狩灵 career for flexibility.

char_relationships.千乐: Her boss at 万事屋, gives her freedom, covers her mistakes, complains constantly. The only place flexible enough for her erratic genius.
